use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and dialogs
Destructive action buttons with visual warning styling
Secondary navigation and multi-step form progression
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars and controls
Link-styled buttons for inline navigation within content
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants and sizes, built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility. Features clean flat design with subtle shadows, comprehensive hover/focus/disabled states, and keyboard accessibility. Supports asChild pattern for rendering as different HTML elements or composing with other Radix primitives. Ideal for building action-heavy interfaces in SaaS, fintech, and dev tooling products.
